SKIN_DESCRIPTION.BERSERKER: The Berserker likes to resolve conflicts... with his HAMMER! If you're close enough to see the whites of his eyes, it's too late - you're going to need a good doctor.
SKIN_DESCRIPTION.RANGER: Definitely not one of Santa's elves. In fact, don't call her an elf at all. The last guy who tried, she shot full of arrows and then fed him to her pet wolf.
SKIN_DESCRIPTION.SORCERER: Commanding the power of lightning, the Sorcerer fries his foes with blasts of electricity. When his Volt Shield is up, enemies can't reach him without getting a nasty jolt.
SKIN_DESCRIPTION.BATTLE_CHEF: Soup is SO on! This Chef uses only the freshest ingredients... taken straight from the foes he slays! Come and get it! The Chef always makes enough food for everyone!
SKIN_DESCRIPTION.VAMPIRE_HUNTER: Certainly not daddy's little girl. She will steal your heart... and then drive a stake through it! Setting up traps and playing games of cat-and-mouse are the Vampire Hunter's specialty!
SKIN_DESCRIPTION.GHOST_SAMURAI: Death before dishonor (literally)! The Ghost Samurai wanders the earth seeking vengeance on his killer. An expert swordsman, few can withstand his phantom katana technique.
SKIN_DESCRIPTION.DEFAULT_BERSERKER: The Berserker likes to resolve conflicts... with his HAMMER! If you're close enough to see the whites of his eyes, it's too late - you're going to need a good doctor.
SKIN_DESCRIPTION.DEFAULT_RANGER: Definitely not one of Santa's elves. In fact, don't call her an elf at all. The last guy who tried, she shot full of arrows and then fed him to her pet wolf.
SKIN_DESCRIPTION.DEFAULT_SORCERER: Commanding the power of lightning, the Sorcerer fries his foes with blasts of electricity. When his Volt Shield is up, enemies can't reach him without getting a nasty jolt.
SKIN_DESCRIPTION.DEFAULT_BATTLE_CHEF: Soup is SO on! This Chef uses only the freshest ingredients... taken straight from the foes he slays! Come and get it! The Chef always makes enough food for everyone!
SKIN_DESCRIPTION.DEFAULT_VAMPIRE_HUNTER: Certainly not daddy's little girl. She will steal your heart... and then drive a stake through it! Setting up traps and playing games of cat-and-mouse are the Vampire Hunter's specialty!
SKIN_DESCRIPTION.DEFAULT_GHOST_SAMURAI: Death before dishonor (literally)! The Ghost Samurai wanders the earth seeking vengeance on his killer. An expert swordsman, few can withstand his phantom katana technique.
SKIN_DESCRIPTION.BRAVEHEART_BERSERKER: They may take this Berserker's life, but they'll never take this his FREEEDDDOOOMMM!
SKIN_DESCRIPTION.DARK_SORCERER: Fueled by the power of dark energy, the Dark Mage shows Dinglepus's 'baddies' what being bad is all about!
SKIN_DESCRIPTION.CHIEFTAIN_BERSERKER: The Berserker likes to resolve conflicts... with his HAMMER! This Chieftain is for Dungeon Rampage Founder's only!
SKIN_DESCRIPTION.BIKER_CHEF: Vrooom! After spending nights whipping up grub at the old greasy spoon biker bar, this road warrior cruises around on his hog (a pig named Lucky Charlie) looking for skulls to crack!
SKIN_DESCRIPTION.RED_RANGER: Over the hill and through the woods, this Ranger is looking for foes to slay and loot to grab! This will not be a grim tale, as your enemies will soon learn to fear the color red!
SKIN_DESCRIPTION.SANTA_RANGER: From roof top to roof top, to taverns and dungeons.  This Ranger is tired of gifting, and looking for enemies to bludgeon!

SKIN_STORE_DESCRIPTION.BERSERKER: Uses Axes, Hammers, & Throwing Weapons. Includes 5 slots of storage!
SKIN_STORE_DESCRIPTION.RANGER: Uses Bows, Swords, & Magic Scrolls. Includes 5 slots of storage!
SKIN_STORE_DESCRIPTION.SORCERER: Uses Lightning Spellbooks & Staves and Magic Scrolls. Includes 5 slots of storage!
SKIN_STORE_DESCRIPTION.BATTLE_CHEF: Uses Meat Cleavers, Cooking Pots, & Throwing Weapons. Includes 5 slots of storage!
SKIN_STORE_DESCRIPTION.VAMPIRE_HUNTER: Uses Dual Crossbows, Traps, Swords, & Throwing Weapons. Includes 5 slots of storage!
SKIN_STORE_DESCRIPTION.GHOST_SAMURAI: Uses Katanas, Swords, & Light Throwing Weapons. Includes 5 slots of storage!
SKIN_STORE_DESCRIPTION.DEFAULT_BERSERKER: Offensive Fighter. Uses Axes, Hammers, & Heavy Throwing Weapons.
SKIN_STORE_DESCRIPTION.DEFAULT_RANGER: Swift Ranged Attacker. Uses Bows, Swords, & Magic Scrolls.
SKIN_STORE_DESCRIPTION.DEFAULT_SORCERER: Lightning Caster. Uses Lightning Spellbooks, Lightning Staves, & Magic Scrolls.
SKIN_STORE_DESCRIPTION.DEFAULT_BATTLE_CHEF: Melee Healer. Uses Meat Cleavers, Cooking Pots, & Light Throwing Weapons.
SKIN_STORE_DESCRIPTION.DEFAULT_VAMPIRE_HUNTER: Ranged Attacker & Trapper. Uses Dual Crossbows, Traps, Swords, & Light Throwing Weapons.
SKIN_STORE_DESCRIPTION.DEFAULT_GHOST_SAMURAI: Swift Fighter. Uses Katanas, Swords, & Light Throwing Weapons.
SKIN_STORE_DESCRIPTION.DARK_SORCERER: Enjoy dark times and dark magic with this Sorcerer style!
SKIN_STORE_DESCRIPTION.CHIEFTAIN_BERSERKER: Offensive Fighter. Uses Axes, Hammers, & Throwing Weapons.
SKIN_STORE_DESCRIPTION.BIKER_CHEF: Serve up some roadkill with this Chef style!
SKIN_STORE_DESCRIPTION.RED_RANGER: Loot dungeons in style and paint the floors the same color as your cloak and cap!
SKIN_STORE_DESCRIPTION.SANTA_RANGER: Stop giving gifts, and start slinging arrows!  This Holiday Ranger is coming to town!

STATS_DESCRIPTION.MELEE_DEF: Reduces damage taken from Melee Attacks
STATS_DESCRIPTION.SHOOT_DEF: Reduces damage taken from Shooting Attacks
STATS_DESCRIPTION.MAGIC_DEF: Reduces damage taken from Magic Attacks
STATS_DESCRIPTION.LUCK: Receive better Treasure and Item Drops!
STATS_DESCRIPTION.FURY: Faster Health Regeneration & better Melee Attack Speed
STATS_DESCRIPTION.COOKING: Better chance to make Food when attacking enemies
STATS_DESCRIPTION.SPIRIT_POWER: Faster Melee Attack Speed & better Mana Regeneration
STATS_DESCRIPTION.MASTER_DEFENSE: Increase Magic, Shooting, and Melee Defense

PET_DESCRIPTION.WOLF_PET: Fierce and loyal melee pet. Collects any Star Items that it walks over.
PET_DESCRIPTION.DRAGON_PET: Tough, ranged pet. Shoots blasts of flame at enemies.
PET_DESCRIPTION.RHINO_PET: Melee tanker pet.  Strong knockback and can ram through groups of enemies.
PET_DESCRIPTION.SHADOW_WOLF_PET: Limited Edition shadow wolf pet.  Attacks with a shadow-shifting teleport attack!
PET_DESCRIPTION.DRAGON_POISON: Limited Edition dragon. Shoots blasts of venom, poisoning groups of enemies!

HINTS.HINT_CONTROLS_1: Optional Keyboard Controls - WASD to move and JKL to attack with your weapons.
HINTS.HINT_CONTROLS_3: To start a Charge Attack using the Mouse, hold down the Left Mouse Button over an enemy.  Release the button when your attack is fully charged.
HINTS.HINT_CONTROLS_4: Hold down the SHIFT button to shoot without moving.
HINTS.HINT_CONTROLS_5: Hold down the Z, X, or C Buttons to start Charging.  When the circle around your Hero is full, let go to release a powerful Charge Attack!
HINTS.HINT_CONTROLS_6: Hold down the Left Mouse button to make your Hero walk toward the cursor.
HINTS.HINT_CONTROLS_7: Why not try using the keyboard to play? Use the Arrow keys to move and attack with ZXC or try moving with WASD and attacking with JKL!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_1: Collect Orange Stars to fill your Dungeon Buster meter. When it's full, press B to use your Dungeon Buster attack!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_2: The max level a Hero can achieve is 100.
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_3: Magic Spells, Throwing Weapons, Charge Attacks, and other Special Weapons and Attacks all consume Mana when used.
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_4: Heroes earn 2 Training Points per level for a total of 200 points at level 100!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_5: You can put up to 75 training points in each category!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_6: Open Chests to find new weapons. Rarer chests yield better weapons!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_7: Different weapons come with different attack types. Find all the weapons to try all the different attack types.
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_8: What you find inside a locked chest will differ depending on which hero you use to open it!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_9: Locked chests offer anything from weapons, potions and health bombs to more keys and even gems!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_10: Be sure to look for locked chests - you will find at least one in every level!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_11: The longer you hold down the button, the faster Repeater attacks will fire!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_12: Some Scaling Weapons get more powerful as you hold the button down. Others shoot more projectiles!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_13: Modifiers improve weapons by adding extra damage or status effects, increasing attack speed and much more!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_14: Modifier effects increase on higher level modifiers, which are found on rarer weapons!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_15: Papa Yeti is afraid of bunnies! Don't tell him I told you that!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_16: The crowd loves it when you bust Dinglepus statues!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_18: Chests have all sorts of loot in them!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_19: Have you ever wondered where Papa Yeti keeps all those Baby Yetis? Yeah. . . me too!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_20: Can you defeat all of the Grindhouse levels?
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_21: Prizes from chests are randomized, but opening them with a particular character will increase your chances of getting a weapon for that character!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_22: Looking for an extra boost? Open up Item Boxes and Royal Item Boxes to get cool items to help your character!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_23: Stuck in a dungeon? Be sure to check the walls for weaknesses. Some walls can be torn down to reveal hidden areas and new paths!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_24: Each of the heroes have their own specialties, so team up with different classes to take on difficult dungeons!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_25: To get the most gold out of a dungeon, smash everything you can! This includes boxes, walls and bad guys!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_26: For every hero you own, you get a 5% XP boost! Collect 'em all!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_28: What's the difference between a Brute and Ms. Brute? Ms. Brute has a bow in her hair!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_29: Each floor of Ultimate Rampage gives a reward the first time a Hero completes it every week!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_30: Heroes that heal are a big help in Ultimate Rampage!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_31: Balance your team for Ultimate Success!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_33: You're going to need some crowd control in Ultimate Rampage.
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_34: Did you find all the Legendary chests this week? Unlock a new hero to try for more!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_35: To run, or not to run?
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_36: Don't forget to bring Potions, Kegs and Power-Ups into Ultimate Rampage! You'll need 'em!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_37: You can only use three Health Bombs and three Party Bombs per Hero in Ultimate Rampage, choose wisely!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_38: Revive downed allies to fight off the hordes, but make sure the coast is clear first!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_41: New modifiers are added on floors 2, 4, 6, and 8. Can you handle them all?
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_42: Pay attention to Ultimate Rampage dungeon modifiers, having the right weapon will spell success for those that are prepared!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_43: The Nemesis cannot be destroyed. Or can he? Probably best to RUN!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_44: Enemies get stronger every time you complete a floor in Ultimate Rampage!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_45: Friends don't let friends fight the Nemesis!
HINTS.HINT_GAMEPLAY_46: Only a fool would try to kill the Nemesis!
HINTS.HINT_DUNGEONS_1: Players are given a Victory XP Bonus at the end of each dungeon.  Players who leave early forfeit this XP Bonus.
HINTS.HINT_DUNGEONS_2: Some Dungeons have multiple floors. You must defeat all of the floors before the dungeon is clear.
HINTS.HINT_DUNGEONS_3: You can lure enemies into Traps to gain a tactical advantage in the dungeon.
HINTS.HINT_DUNGEONS_4: Play advanced Leagues to discover new environments, fierce monsters, and powerful weapons.
HINTS.HINT_DUNGEONS_5: More advanced Dungeons award more Experience and better Treasure!
HINTS.HINT_MULTIPLAYER_1: All XP, Gold, and Treasure found inside a Dungeon is shared with your Party. Everyone gets their fair share of the earned loot!
HINTS.HINT_MULTIPLAYER_2: Send FREE Gifts to your friends from the Gifts area in town!
HINTS.HINT_MULTIPLAYER_3: Don't rush to the exit too quickly! Be sure to find all the gold and treasure you can before leaving!
HINTS.HINT_MULTIPLAYER_4: The game gets harder as more people join a dungeon. Be sure to stick together to fight off the waves of baddies!
HINTS.HINT_UPSELL_1: The Battle Chef can cook food to heal and give special bonuses to himself and other players!
HINTS.HINT_UPSELL_2: The Ranger has excellent ranged attacks, but is weak in melee combat.
HINTS.HINT_UPSELL_3: The Sorcerer has powerful lightning magic that shreds crowds of enemies!
HINTS.HINT_UPSELL_4: The Ghost Samurai's mystic sword technique delivers spectral punishment upon his foes.
HINTS.HINT_UPSELL_5: The Vampire Hunter can dual-wield two crossbows and throw traps at enemies!
HINTS.HINT_UPSELL_6: Every Hero character has a unique Dungeon Buster super attack! Collect them all to build the ultimate team!
HINTS.HINT_UPSELL_7: The Pyromancer can dive through flame traps without getting hurt and unleash flaming fury on all his foes!
HINTS.HINT_TOWN_1: Find new, more powerful weapons by opening locked chests with keys!
HINTS.HINT_TOWN_2: Upgrade your Hero's stats in the Training area!
HINTS.HINT_TOWN_3: Purchase and recruit new Heroes in the Tavern!
HINTS.HINT_TOWN_4: Styles give your hero a unique look!

DUNGEON_MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.INFINITE_DANGEROUS_FODDER: All props in dungeon spawn bombs on death.
DUNGEON_MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.INFINITE_POISONOUS_OXYGEN: Who farted?  Poison damage over time.
DUNGEON_MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.INFINITE_ICE_BOMBS: Defeated enemies have a chance to drop freeze bombs.
DUNGEON_MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.INFINITE_REGEN_NEGATION: Hero health and mana regeneration is disabled.
DUNGEON_MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.INFINITE_IMMUNITY_CRIT: Heroes no longer deal critical hits.
DUNGEON_MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.INFINITE_DANGEROUS_DEATHS: Defeated enemies have a chance to drop bombs.
DUNGEON_MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.INFINITE_SPECTRAL_HARASSMENT: An annoying specter follows you around.
DUNGEON_MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.INFINITE_LIGHTNING_ORBS: Enemies have a chance when being hit to spawn lightning orbs.

MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.CHILLING_5: Slow enemies movement and attacks for 6 sec!

MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.BURNING_2: Set enemies on fire for five seconds! Deals 20% weapon damage!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.BURNING_3: Set enemies on fire for five seconds! Deals 30% weapon damage!

MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.BURNING_5: Set enemies on fire for five seconds! Deals 50% weapon damage!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.SHOCKING_1: Stop enemies from moving or attacking for 0.5 sec!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.SHOCKING_2: Stop enemies from moving or attacking for 1 sec!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.SHOCKING_3: Stop enemies from moving or attacking for 1.5 sec!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.SHOCKING_4: Stop enemies from moving or attacking for 2 sec!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.SHOCKING_5: Stop enemies from moving or attacking for 2.5 sec!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.POISON_1: Poison enemies for 8 seconds! Deals 2.5% weapon damage and duration stacks!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.POISON_2: Poison enemies for 8 seconds! Deals 5% weapon damage and duration stacks!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.POISON_3: Poison enemies for 8 seconds! Deals 10% weapon damage and duration stacks!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.POISON_4: Poison enemies for 8 seconds! Deals 15% weapon damage and duration stacks!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.POISON_5: Poison enemies for 8 seconds! Deals 20% weapon damage and duration stacks!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.CRIT_CHANCE_1: 10% chance to deal 100% extra damage! Stacks with Vicious!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.CRIT_CHANCE_2: 12.5% chance to deal 100% extra damage! Stacks with Vicious!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.CRIT_CHANCE_3: 15% chance to deal 100% extra damage! Stacks with Vicious!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.CRIT_CHANCE_4: 20% chance to deal 100% extra damage! Stacks with Vicious!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.CRIT_CHANCE_5: 25% chance to deal 100% extra damage! Stacks with Vicious!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.CRIT_DAMAGE_1: Adds 5% chance to crit with 200% damage! Stacks with Critical!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.CRIT_DAMAGE_2: Adds 5% chance to crit with 250% damage! Stacks with Critical!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.CRIT_DAMAGE_3: Adds 5% chance to crit with 300% damage! Stacks with Critical!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.CRIT_DAMAGE_4: Adds 5% chance to crit with 350% damage! Stacks with Critical!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.CRIT_DAMAGE_5: Adds 5% chance to crit with 400% damage! Stacks with Critical!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.CHAIN_1: Projectile pierces through first enemy seeks another!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.PIERCE_1: Projectile pierces straight through first enemy and can hit another!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.PIERCE_2: Projectile can pierce straight through first two enemies!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.PIERCE_3: Projectile can pierce straight through first three enemies!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.PIERCE_4: Projectile can pierce straight through first four enemies!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.PIERCE_5: Projectile can pierce straight through first five enemies!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.SPAWN_FOOD_ON_HIT_1: 3% chance to spawn food when hitting enemies!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.SPAWN_FOOD_ON_HIT_2: 4% chance to spawn food when hitting enemies!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.SPAWN_FOOD_ON_HIT_3: 5% chance to spawn food when hitting enemies!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.SPAWN_FOOD_ON_HIT_4: 6% chance to spawn food when hitting enemies!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.SPAWN_FOOD_ON_HIT_5: 7% chance to spawn food when hitting enemies!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.DEATH_FOOD_1: 5% chance to get food when killing enemies!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.DEATH_FOOD_2: 10% chance to get food when killing enemies!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.DEATH_FOOD_3: 15% chance to get food when killing enemies!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.DEATH_FOOD_4: 20% chance to get food when killing enemies!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.DEATH_FOOD_5: 25% chance to get food when killing enemies!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.SCALING_PROJECTILES_1: Fires an extra projectle when charged!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.SCALING_PROJECTILES_2: Fires two extra projectles when charged!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.SCALING_PROJECTILES_3: Fires three extra projectles when charged!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.SCALING_PROJECTILES_4: Fires four extra projectles when charged!
MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.SCALING_PROJECTILES_5: Fires five extra projectles when charged!

LEGENDARY_MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.STAMINA: Increases player health by 10 + Weapon Level * 0.9
LEGENDARY_MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.APTITUDE: Increases player mana by 10 + Weapon Level * 0.4
LEGENDARY_MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.BEAST_MASTER: Increases pet health by 10 + Weapon Level * 0.9
LEGENDARY_MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.ANIMAL_FURY: Increases pet damage by 20 + Weapon Level * 1.8
LEGENDARY_MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.ADMIRALS_WISDOM: Decreases damage taken by traps by 25%
LEGENDARY_MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.BUSTER_GENERATOR: Gain 1 Buster Point per enemy killed!
LEGENDARY_MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.BRAIN_TRUST: Increases experience dropped from enemies by 5%
LEGENDARY_MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.MIDAS_TOUCH: Increases gold dropped from enemies by 5%
LEGENDARY_MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.BARRIER: Reduces Melee Damage taken by 50%. Does not stack.
LEGENDARY_MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.COVER: Reduces Ranged Damage taken by 50%. Does not stack.
LEGENDARY_MODIFIER_DESCRIPTION.COMPREHENSION: Reduces Magic Damage taken by 50%. Does not stack.

STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.HEALTH_BOMB: Revives you to full health & damages enemies!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.PARTY_BOMB: Revives party to full health & damages enemies!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.REGULAR_COIN_POTION: Get rich quick! Gain double coins for 30 minutes!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.MAJOR_COIN_POTION: Get rich quick! Gain quadruple coins for 15 minutes!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.EPIC_COIN_POTION: Get rich quick! Gain 10x coins for 7.5 minutes! Stuff your pockets as fast as you can!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.CONSUMABLE_HEALTH_POTION: Use to heal 100% of your Health!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.CONSUMABLE_HEALTH_PARTY_POTION: Use to heal 100% of your Health as well any nearby allies!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.CONSUMABLE_MANA_POTION: Use to restore 100% of your Mana!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.CONSUMABLE_MANA_PARTY_POTION: Use to restore 100% of your Mana as well as any nearby allies!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.CONSUMABLE_DEMOLITION_BOMB: Blows up, stunning and damaging enemies!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.CONSUMABLE_STAT_MOVEMENT_POTION: Increases move speed by 50% for 30 seconds!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.CONSUMABLE_STAT_ATTACK_POTION: Increases damage dealt by 100% for 30 seconds!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.CONSUMABLE_STAT_ATTACKSPEED_POTION: Increases attack speed by 100% for 30 seconds!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.CONSUMABLE_STAT_MOVEMENT_PARTY_POTION: Increases move speed by 50% for 30 seconds for you and your nearby allies!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.CONSUMABLE_STAT_ATTACK_PARTY_POTION: Increases damage dealt by 100% for 30 seconds for you and your nearby allies!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.CONSUMABLE_STAT_ATTACKSPEED_PARTY_POTION: Increases attack speed by 100% for 30 seconds for you and your nearby allies!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.CONSUMABLE_STAT_DEFENSE_PARTY_POTION: Increases defense for 60 seconds for you and your nearby allies!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.CONSUMABLE_STAT_BOOSTER_PARTY_POTION: Refills Dungeon Buster for you and your nearby allies!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.CONSUMABLE_HEALTH_SHOT: Use to heal 25% of your max Health!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.CONSUMABLE_BUSTER_SHOT: Use to fill up a bit of your Dungeon Buster!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.CONSUMABLE_SMALL_MUSHROOM_PARTY_POTION: What mysteriously small fungi! Bring friends!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.CONSUMABLE_ICE_BOMB: Blows up, freezing and damaging enemies!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.CONSUMABLE_FIRE_BOMB: Blows up, burning and damaging enemies!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.CONSUMABLE_VOLT_BOMB: Blows up, shocking and damaging enemies!
STACKABLE_DESCRIPTION.CONSUMABLE_POISON_BOMB: Blows up, poisoning and damaging enemies!

ATTACK_BUSTER_DESCRIPTION.DBUSTER_BERSERK: The Berserker goes on a Rampage!  Also, the Berserker and nearby allies become awesomer for 12 seconds.
ATTACK_BUSTER_DESCRIPTION.DBUSTER_ARROWSTORM: The Ranger fires 3 piercing waves of arrows at your enemies!  Each arrow wave can be aimed separately.
ATTACK_BUSTER_DESCRIPTION.DBUSTER_BALL_LIGHTNING: Summons 4 lightning balls to form a barrier around the Sorcerer, frying all nearby enemies.
ATTACK_BUSTER_DESCRIPTION.DBUSTER_MEATEOR_SHOWER: Falling cows rain from the sky, damaging foes and spawning Hamburger food items!
ATTACK_BUSTER_DESCRIPTION.DBUSTER_GARLIC_NUKE: The Vampire Hunter scatters 6 Garlic Nuke traps around her, forming a deadly defensive ring.
ATTACK_BUSTER_DESCRIPTION.DBUSTER_IRON_LEGION: Summons 3 samurai Armor Clones to fight for you!  Each Armor Clone lasts for 30 seconds.

WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LASER_SWORD: A sword made out of light! I know, pretty unreasonable, but it sure is fast!
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_MAGIC_SWORD: A sword made out of light! I know, pretty unreasonable, but it sure is fast!
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_ICE_SWORD: They don't make 'em like they used to.
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_HAND_AXE: Axe for quickly chopping wood. Replace 'wood' with 'anyone in your way'.
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_BATTLE_AXE: To use, say to enemy: Can I 'axe' you a question?  Then, before they respond, 'axe' them anyway. . .  right in the face!
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_MONSTER_AXE: Seriously, who's going to mess with the guy with the huge axe?
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_FIRE_AXE: They don't make 'em like they used to.
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_HEAVY_HAMMER: A heavy hammer to smash the ground and blow away enemies.
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_HEAVIER_HAMMER: Concentrates your might into a powerful smash destroying enemies in close range!
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_BATTLE_HAMMER: Seriously, how do I even swing this thing?
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LIGHT_KATANA: Bewilder enemies with your speed with this light katana.
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_REGULAR_KATANA: A powerful katana specializing in wide swings to bring down multiple enemies at once.
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_HEAVY_KATANA: A heavy katana that strikes with incredible damage but requires intense focus to master.
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_FAST_FRYING_PAN: What's for dinner? Destruction, that's what!
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_FRYING_PAN: Serves up bacon, eggs, and PAIN!
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_HEAVY_FRYING_PAN: When you absolutely need to G someone TFO of your kitchen.
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_BUTCHERS_KNIFE: A light cleaver useful for fast precision strikes to carve up ham, beef, or enemies!
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_MEAT_CLEAVER: A meaty meat cleaver for cleaving meat!
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_BACON_BOOSTER: A useful cleaver for boosting improving your skills at cooking, and smashing enemies!
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_CLEAVER_01: They don't make 'em like they used to.
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_CLEAVER_04: They don't make 'em like they used to.
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_FOOD_COOKING_POT: The best medicine for a nasty injury?  MEAT!  Cook some and keep the rampage going.
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_BUFF_COOKING_POT: Creates hearty food that improves rampaging performance.
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_POISON_COOKING_POT: Use spoiled ingredients to create poisonous meals to feed enemies!
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LIGHTNING_BLAST_STAFF: Staff charged with powerful Lightning energy!
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_LIGHTNING_STAFF_02: They don't make 'em like they used to.
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LIGHTNING_BOOK: Learn how to shoot Chain Lightning out of your fingertips!
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_LIGHTNING_BOOK_01: They don't make 'em like they used to.
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_HEAVY_THROWING_ROCKS: It's a rock.  Do not drop on your toes.
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LIGHT_THROWING_SHURIKENS: Can I throw this at your face? Sure, you can! Get it? Shuriken. . .  sure, you can?
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_THROWING_RANGS_02: They don't make 'em like they used to.
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_SCROLL_SPEED: Contains ancient secrets of running fast!
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_SCROLL_HEAL: Inscribed are the words: 'To be awesome, heal everyone fighting with you.'
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_SCROLL_SPEED: They don't make 'em like they used to.
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_DESCRIPTION.EN_SORCERER_RIVAL_LIGHTNING_BOOK: Learn how to shoot Chain Lightning out of your fingertips!

WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_SHORT_SWORD: Tap to execute a fast combo, dashing forward with each attack!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_REGULAR_SWORD: Tap to execute a combo, dashing forward with each attack!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LONG_SWORD: Tap to dash backwards and unleash a giant forward slash ! Great for escaping!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LASER_SWORD: Tap to execute a blazingly fast combo, dashing forward with each attack!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_MAGIC_SWORD: Tap to execute a combo, dashing forward with each attack!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_ICE_SWORD: Tap to execute a combo, dashing forward with each attack!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_HAND_AXE: Tap to execute a quick striking combo while dashing forward!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_BATTLE_AXE: Tap to execute a combo to sweep through enemies!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_MONSTER_AXE: Tap to execute a slow and powerful combo!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_FIRE_AXE: Tap to execute a combo, dashing forward with each attack!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_HEAVY_HAMMER: Tap to smash the ground and damage nearby foes!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_HEAVIER_HAMMER: Tap to smash the ground and do massive damage to close enemies!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_WAR_MALLET: Tap to release a strong strike smashing the ground and enemies in a straight line!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_BATTLE_HAMMER: Tap to release a powerful and slow strike smashing the ground and enemies in a straight line!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LIGHT_KATANA: Tap to execute a combo, dashing forward with each attack!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_REGULAR_KATANA: Tap to execute a combo, swinging at wide angles!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_HEAVY_KATANA: Tap to execute a combo, slowly picking apart your enemies with powerful strikes!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_FAST_FRYING_PAN: Tap to quickly bust some skulls in front of the Chef!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_FRYING_PAN: Tap to bust some skulls in front of the Chef!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_HEAVY_FRYING_PAN: Tap to strongly bust some skulls in front of the Chef!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_BUTCHERS_KNIFE: Tap to execute a combo, dashing forward with each attack!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_MEAT_CLEAVER: Tap to execute a combo, swinging wildly at enemies in front of you!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_BACON_BOOSTER: Tap to execute a combo with slow and powerful strikes!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_CLEAVER_01: Tap to execute a combo, dashing forward with each attack!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_CLEAVER_04: Tap to execute a combo, dashing forward with each attack!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_FOOD_COOKING_POT: Tap to cook a quick meal to restore health!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_BUFF_COOKING_POT: Tap to cook a quick meal that buffs your hero!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_POISON_COOKING_POT: Tap to cook spoiled food that poisons enemies!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_TRAP_GARLIC: Tap to drop Garlic Bomb to stun enemies!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_TRAP_MINES: Tap to drop Mines that do tons of damage!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_TRAP_FIREBOMBS: Tap to drop Firebomb to set enemies on fire!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LIGHTNING_ARC_STAFF: Tap to shoot energy blast! Consumes no mana!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LIGHTNING_BLAST_STAFF: Tap to shoot energy blast! Consumes no mana!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LIGHTNING_NOVA_STAFF: Tap to shoot energy blast! Consumes no mana!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_LIGHTNING_STAFF_02: Tap to shoot energy blast! Consumes no mana!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LIGHTNING_BOOK: Tap to release a bolt of lightning chain! Strikes two enemies!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_SHOCKWAVE_BOOK: Unleash a giant arc of energy!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_THUNDERSTORM_BOOK: Unleashes a lighning bolt from above! Deals massive damage!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_LIGHTNING_BOOK_01: Tap to release a bolt of lightning chain! Strikes two enemies!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_HEAVY_THROWING_ROCKS: Tap to throw a big rock! Big rocks hurt! Has a big cooldown though.
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_HEAVY_THROWING_RANGS: Tap to throw small boomerangs  that hit enemies multiple times!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LIGHT_THROWING_KNIVES: Tap to slowly throw powerful knives!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_THROWING_RANGS_02: Tap to throw battlerang! Don't worry, it will come back!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_SCROLL_SPEED: Tap to cast Speed Buff on you and your allies!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_SCROLL_SNARE: Tap to cast Magic Snare against an enemy!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_SCROLL_HEAL: Tap to cast Healing Aura around you and your allies!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_SCROLL_SPEED: Tap to cast Speed Buff on you and your allies!
WEAPON_ITEM_TAP_DESCRIPTION.DEFAULT_CONSUMABLE_WEAPON: Tap to cast Speed Buff on you and your allies!

WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_SHORT_SWORD: Charge up and release to slash enemies, slowing them!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_REGULAR_SWORD: Charge up and release this attack to dash forward and deliver a two-hit slash. A great opening attack!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LONG_SWORD: Charge up and release to dash forward and unleash a giant slash! Great for initiating!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_MAGIC_SWORD: Charge up and release this attack to dash forward and deliver a two-hit slash. A great opening attack!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_ICE_SWORD: Charge up and release to unleash an ice pulse! Chills nearby enemies, slowing movement and attack speed!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_HAND_AXE: Charge up and release to dash forward and carve up your enemies!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_BATTLE_AXE: Charge up and release a powerful strike that cripples and knockbacks enemies!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_MONSTER_AXE: Charge up and release to shatter the ground in a line to damage your enemies!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_FIRE_AXE: Charge up and release to unleash a flame pulse! Sets nearby enemies on fire, causing Damage over Time!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LIGHT_KATANA: Charge and release to dash forward in a line with shadow clones quickly slicing enemies!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_REGULAR_KATANA: Charge and release to strike nearby enemies with the power of your soul!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_HEAVY_KATANA: Charge and release to strike the ground and release a powerful shockwave forward!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_BUTCHERS_KNIFE: Hold to attack faster and faster!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_MEAT_CLEAVER: Hold to attack faster and faster!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_BACON_BOOSTER: Hold to attack faster and faster!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_CLEAVER_01: Charge and release to dash forward and wildly slice apart foes!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_CLEAVER_04: Charge and release to place poisonous poultry that damage hungry enemies!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_SHORT_BOW: Hold to ready more arrows for a wide-angled spread shot!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_REGULAR_BOW: Hold to ready more arrows for a narrow-angled spread shot!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LONG_BOW: Hold to draw your bow string and increase damage!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_MAGIC_BOW: Hold to ready more arrows for a narrow-angled spread shot!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_WOODCUTTERS_BOW: Hold to ready more arrows for a narrow-angled spread shot!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LIGHT_CROSSBOWS: Hold to fire faster and faster!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_DUAL_CROSSBOWS: Hold to in a spread in front of you, faster and faster!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_HEAVY_CROSSBOWS: Fires 5 Crossbow Bolts in rapid-fire succession while dashing away! Great for escaping!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_SEEKER_CROSSBOWS: Fires a burst of 5 Seeker Bolts in a tight cluster! Automatically seeks out nearby enemies and chases them!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_TRAP_GARLIC: Hold to throw Garlic Mines!  Hold longer to throw farther!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_TRAP_MINES: Hold to throw Mines!  Hold longer to throw farther!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_TRAP_FIREBOMBS: Hold to throw Firebombs!  Hold longer to throw farther!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LIGHTNING_ARC_STAFF: Charge up and release to shoot a lightning blast! Hits enemies in a line and Slows them for 1 second!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LIGHTNING_BLAST_STAFF: Charge up shoot multiple Energy Blasts at once!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_LIGHTNING_STAFF_02: Charge up and release to shoot a lightning blast! Hits enemies in a line and Shocks them for 1 second!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LIGHTNING_BOOK: Charge up and release to unleash twin chain lightning bolts!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_THUNDERSTORM_BOOK: Charge up and release to unleash a devastating Thunderstorm upon your enemies!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_HEAVY_THROWING_ROCKS: Hold to scale how far and powerful the rock is thrown!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_HEAVY_THROWING_RANGS: Charge and release to throw out three orbiting boomerangs for 20 seconds!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LIGHT_THROWING_KNIVES: Charge and release to throw a powerful knife that pierces through enemies!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LIGHT_THROWING_SHURIKENS: Charge and release to rapidly throw fans of shurikens!
WEAPON_ITEM_HOLD_DESCRIPTION.HERO_LEGACY_THROWING_RANGS_02: Charge up and release to throw a Lazy Boomerang! These boomerangs return more slowly to the thrower.

WEAPON_AESTHETIC_NAME.LEGENDARY_HERO_SHOCKWAVE_BOOK_00: Advanced Principles of Electrodynamic Magicks Textbook
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_NAME.HERO_LEGACY_LIGHTNING_BOOK_01_2: Vintage Sage Tome of Chain Lightning
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_NAME.HERO_LEGACY_LIGHTNING_BOOK_01_3: Vintage Arcane Tome of Chain Lightning
WEAPON_AESTHETIC_NAME.HERO_LEGACY_LIGHTNING_BOOK_01_4: Vintage Master Tome of Chain Lightning
